requests.author: Isaac Eleini
requests.text:
Hi Julia,

Thanks for chasing and I apologise for the slow response - I have been liaising with a few colleagues internally about this.

Costs will generally rise from year to year. How much will depend on the scale of the service and choice of products, as well as factoring in inflation and other product developments?

I would love to discuss this with you in greater detail on a call to understan

requests.text:
I’m looking to gain a few stats, ideally without doing any clunky excel downloads. Let me know if you can help!

(2) How many broadcast sources do we have? Do we know the number of sources by country? I know it is only English language but would be good to see where from.
(3) Why do we not translate foreign language broadcast? Is it because of the quality of
